full_text:
Cao Kang 曹抗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Kang (曹抗). One of the many Cao dukes that held little authority. Cao Kang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Kang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
